metadata.units: tonnes CO2 per MWh of generation

source.coal: EPA eGRID 2023 (released Jan 2025), ERCT subregion, coal class
source.gas_cc: NETL combined-cycle technology factor, ~50% thermal efficiency
source.gas: NETL simple-cycle / steam factor, ~33% thermal efficiency
source.other: Weighted estimate for ERCOT Other category (petroleum coke / fuel oil / landfill gas)
source.biomass: IPCC biogenic convention (direct emissions treated as neutral)

notes: eGRID publishes combined-cycle and simple-cycle gas as one bucket; we split using NETL tech factors.
Texas gas fleet is ~80% combined-cycle (see notebook 02), so the split matters meaningfully.
